title: Senior Teacher - Navneet Education - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Navneet Education - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
